meta.pageTitle: Pro Fast AI — AI Assistant for Service Businesses

hero.badge: Now serving Orange County service businesses
hero.subtitle: An AI assistant that answers inquiries 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments, and captures revenue — automatically. Fast replies. No missed opportunities.

cards.title: Missed calls after hours
cards.body: People call evenings and weekends with real questions. If nobody picks up, they move on to the next business on their list.

cards.title: Same questions, every day
cards.body: Hours, pricing, insurance, services, parking — your team answers the same things dozens of times. That time adds up.

cards.title: Bookings that never happen
cards.body: Without a simple booking path, prospects give up. You lose the appointment and the revenue.

cards.title: Lost leads every night
cards.body: Every unanswered message is someone who may have chosen you — if you had responded when they were ready.

steps.title: You share your business info
steps.body: Services, hours, location, FAQs, booking policy, and what you want the bot to qualify. A 15-minute call or a quick email. That's it.

steps.title: We build your custom AI bot
steps.body: Trained on your specific business. Answers in your tone. Handles your most common questions automatically.

steps.title: It goes live on your website
steps.body: One line of code added to your site. Works on Wix, Squarespace, WordPress, or any platform. No technical knowledge needed on your end.

steps.title: It works while you sleep
steps.body: Clients chat, get answers, and book appointments at 2am. You wake up to qualified leads and bookings in your inbox or calendar.

disclaimerParts: The live demo below is currently set up as a
example. Your production bot is trained for your own business and industry.
demo.placeholderBody: Use the chat in this section to try a live conversation — the same style of experience your clients get on your site.
